groups.note: the brief says nothing about money — deposits, fees, refunds or billing are inventions unless licensed
the brief never names a channel — 'the member is informed' is domain language; email/SMS/push is an invented specific
the brief has one kind of member — tiers, premium levels or member classes are inventions
the brief allows cancelling but states no notice rule — any window/notice-period specific must be licensed
the brief states no cap on active bookings — a concrete limit is the classic invented boundary and must be licensed
the brief has no waitlist concept — standby/queue behaviour is an invention
